AddressInfo.Title: AC at The Country Club Johannesburg - Woodmead

Hours:
Mon - Sun: 05:00 - 23:00

Charging Hours: Only within trading hours

GeneralComments:
The 208 hectare Woodmead club has two superb golf courses (Woodmead and Rocklands) and a 9-hole Mashie course. The CP is situated in the Main Parking Area, between the Club House & the Cricket Field.
(Available to members only)
